scripts.dev: uv run --with streamlit --with pandas --with plotly --with openai --with python-dotenv streamlit run app.py --server.address 0.0.0.0 --server.port ${PORT:-8501}
scripts.start: uv run --with streamlit --with pandas --with plotly --with openai --with python-dotenv streamlit run app.py --server.address 0.0.0.0 --server.port ${PORT:-8501}
